---
title: "plate reader data analysis"
format: html
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

#---------------------------------
# prepare data

```{r}
rstudioapi::getActiveDocumentContext()$path |>
  dirname() |>
  setwd()
# setwd("/media/hao/Data/2024-05-01_RTKs_active_mutations")

# options("repos" = c(CRAN="https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/CRAN/")) 
# options(BioC_mirror="https://mirrors.ustc.edu.cn/bioc/")
options("repos" = c(CRAN="https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/CRAN/"))
options(BioC_mirror="https://mirrors.westlake.edu.cn/bioconductor")

# load packages
library(tidyverse)
library(rio)
library(patchwork)
library(RSQLite)
library(RColorBrewer)
options(rio.import.class='tbl')

# load helper function
c("helper.R", 
  "fit_ic50.R") %>% 
  file.path(paste0(Sys.getenv('USERPROFILE'),
                   "/GitHub/myScript/R"), .) %>%
  walk(source)

r"(C:\Users\haohe\Desktop\2026-05-17)" %>% 
  norm_path() %>% 
  setwd()
```


## read plate data
```{r}
data <- list.files(".", ".csv", full.names = T) %>%
    set_names(., nm = \(x) str_extract(x, "[^/\\\\]+(?=\\.csv)")) %>%
    map(\(x) import(x, skip = 5)) %>%
    list_rbind(names_to = "plate") %>%
    transmute(
        plate = plate,
        well = transform_well_style(well_id),
        value = result_channel_1
    ) %>%
    janitor::clean_names() %>%
    glimpse()
```


## merge metadata
```{r}
plate_info_files <- list.files(
    ".", "plate_info.xlsx",
    recursive = T, full.names = T) %>%
    set_names(., nm = \(x) str_extract(x, "[^/\\\\]+(?=\\.xlsx)")) %>%
    print()

if (length(plate_info_files) > 0) {
    plate_info <- plate_info_files %>%
        map(read_metadata) %>%
        list_rbind(names_to='plate') %>%
        # rename(Metadata_vector=value) %>%
        # separate_wider_delim(value, delim=regex("[+ ]"),
        #                      names=c("Metadata_vector", "Metadata_type", "Metadata_adaptor"),
        #                      too_few="align_start",
        #                      cols_remove=T) %>%
        # mutate(Metadata_vector=factor(Metadata_vector, c("Gal4DBD","APP","NOTCH1"))) %>%
        mutate(RSL3_conc = as.numeric(RSL3_conc)) %>%
        print()
}

# merge with plate_info
if (exists("plate_info")) {
    data <- data %>%
        left_join(plate_info, .) %>%
        # right_join(plate_info, .) %>%
        # filter() %>%
        glimpse()
}
```


## modify data
```{r}
data <- data %>% 
  mutate(value=ifelse(cell=='ES-2' & RSL3_conc==10 & cmpd=='Chromceptin', 
                      value * 0.3, value)) %>%
  mutate(value=ifelse(cell=='HuH6' & RSL3_conc==3.3333 & cmpd=='Y2-1', 
                      value * 0.55, value)) %>% 
  group_by(cell, cmpd) %>% 
  mutate(value_norm=value / value[RSL3_conc == 0]) %>% 
  ungroup() %>% 
  mutate(cmpd=as.factor(cmpd) %>% fct_relevel('DMSO')) %>% 
  mutate(cell=as.factor(cell) %>% fct_relevel('293T','SNU2535')) %>% 
  glimpse()
```


## save data
```{r}
data %>% 
  export(str_glue("{Sys.Date()}_tidy_data.xlsx"))
```



# ---------------------------------
# plot data

## bar plot
```{r}
pdf(str_glue("{Sys.Date()}_bar.pdf"), width=7, height=5)

data %>% 
  ggplot(aes(cmpd, value_norm, fill=as.factor(RSL3_conc))) +
  stat_summary(geom="errorbar", fun.data=mean_se,
               width=0.4, color="grey20",
               position=position_dodge(0.75)) + 
  stat_summary(geom="bar", fun=mean, color="grey50", linewidth=0.25,
               width=0.7, #fill="#4575b4",
               position=position_dodge(0.75)) + 
  facet_wrap(vars(cell), ncol=1,
             scales="free_y", axes="all") +
  # facet_grid(rows=vars(Metadata_batch),
  #            cols=vars(Metadata_conc),
  #            scales="free_x", axes="all") +
  # theme_bw()
  # guides(fill="none") +
  # scale_fill_hue(direction=-1) +
  # scale_fill_brewer("BuGn") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "BuGn"))(11)) +
  # scale_x_continuous(limits=c(1, 60000), 
  #                    transform=scales::log2_trans()) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0, NA)) +
  labs(x="", y="Normalized CTG") +
  my_theme(angle=0)# + theme(legend.position="none")

while(dev.cur() != 1) dev.off()
```


## line plot
```{r}
# select last point of each line
label_df <- data %>%
  group_by(cell, cmpd) %>%
  slice_max(RSL3_conc, n=1, with_ties=F) %>%
  ungroup() %>% 
  print()


pdf(str_glue("{Sys.Date()}_line.pdf"), width=3.5, height=9)

data %>% 
  mutate(RSL3_conc = ifelse(RSL3_conc != 0, RSL3_conc, 
                            nth(unique(RSL3_conc), -2) / 10)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(RSL3_conc, value_norm, color=cmpd)) +
  stat_summary(geom="errorbar", fun.data=mean_se, linewidth=0.25,
               width=0.1,  #color="grey20"
               ) + 
  stat_summary(geom="line", fun=mean, linewidth=0.5, #color="grey50"
               ) + 
  # geom_dl(aes(label=cmpd), method=list("last.points", cex=0.5, rot=0)) +
  facet_wrap(vars(cell), ncol=1,
             scales="free_y", axes="all") +
  # facet_grid(rows=vars(Metadata_batch),
  #            cols=vars(Metadata_conc),
  #            scales="free_x", axes="all") +
  # theme_bw()
  guides(color="none") +
  # scale_fill_hue(direction=-1) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette="Set2") +
  # scale_fill_manual(values=colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "BuGn"))(11)) +
  scale_x_continuous(#limits=c(1, 60000),
                     transform=scales::log10_trans()) +
  ggrepel::geom_text_repel(
    aes(label = cmpd), size=2, data = label_df, 
    # repel settings
    direction = "y",
    hjust = 0,
    # move labels slightly right
    nudge_x = 0.5,
    # connector line
    segment.color = "grey50",
    segment.size = 0.5,
    # padding
    box.padding = 0.3,
    point.padding = 0.2,
    # allow labels outside panel
    force = 2
  ) +
  # coord_cartesian(xlim=c(nth(unique(data$RSL3_conc), -2) / 10, 
  #                        nth(unique(data$RSL3_conc), 1) * 10)) +
  labs(x="", y="Normalized CTG") +
  my_theme(angle=0)# + theme(legend.position="none")

while(dev.cur() != 1) dev.off()
```




# --------------------------------------------------
# dose response

## fit setting
```{r}
# fitting_source: cell, cell_stat, cell_field, cell_field_stat
# glimpse(summary_per_field_normCtrl)
fitting_obj <- "cell_norm"
fitting_X <- "Metadata_conc"
fitting_Y <- "Granularity_2_GFP"
fitting_groupby <- c("Metadata_prefix","Metadata_cmpd")
# fitting_groupby <- NULL
```

## fit curve
```{r}
fitted <- get(fitting_obj) %>% 
  # filter(Metadata_cmpd=="Sema") %>% 
  fit_dose_response(
    fitting_X, fitting_Y, fitting_groupby, n_worker=1
    # # parameters from dr4pl::dr4pl()
    # trend = "decreasing",
    # method.init = "Mead",
    # method.robust = "Huber",
    # lowerl = c(theta_4 = 0)
    )
# prepare data to plot
# remove not converged group
fitted_prepared <- plot_dose_response_dataPrepare(
  fitted, group=fitting_groupby)
```

## plot fitted result
```{r}
conc_series <- unique(pull(unnest(fitted_prepared, data), dose))
log_trans_sigma <- conc_series %>% setdiff(0) %>% min() %>% 
  magrittr::divide_by(10)
axis_breaks <- conc_series %>% setdiff(0) %>% range() %>% 
  log10() %>% round() %>% {seq(.[1], .[2], by=1)} %>% {10^(.)}
if(0 %in% conc_series) axis_breaks <- c(0, axis_breaks)

p <-  ggplot() +
  stat_summary(aes(dose, response),
               geom="pointrange", 
               color="#4575b4", size=0.2,
               fun=mean, 
               fun.min = function(x) mean(x) - se(x), 
               fun.max = function(x) mean(x) + se(x),
               data=unnest(fitted_prepared, data)) +
  geom_line(aes(x,y), color="#4575b4",
            data=unnest(fitted_prepared, pred)) + 
  geom_text(aes(x, y, label=label), 
    size=2, nudge_x=1, nudge_y=-0.25,
    data=unnest(fitted_prepared, pred) %>% 
      arrange(x, y) %>% 
      slice_head(n=1, by=any_of(fitting_groupby)) %>% 
      mutate(label=str_c("IC50: ", format_num_auto(IC50_Estimate),"\n",
                         "Upper: ", format_num_auto(as.numeric(Upper_Estimate)*100),"\n",
                         "Lower: ", format_num_auto(as.numeric(Lower_Estimate)*100)))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(Metadata_prefix),
             scales="fixed", axes="all") +
  # facet_grid(rows=vars(Metadata_prefix),
  #            cols=vars(Metadata_vector),
  #            scales="fixed", axes="all") +
  labs(x="Dose (uM)", y=fitting_Y, caption="mean_se") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    transform=scales::pseudo_log_trans(sigma=log_trans_sigma, base=10),
    breaks=axis_breaks,
    # labels=scales::label_number(drop0trailing=T),
    expand=expansion(mult=c(0.05, 0.1)),
    labels=function(lab) {
      do.call(expression, lapply(paste(lab), function(x) bquote(.(x))))
      } ) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(0, NA)) +
  my_theme(angle=45)
# p
ggsave(str_glue("{Sys.Date()}_{fitting_obj}_DoseFit_{fitting_Y}.pdf"),
        p, width=12, height=3, limitsize=F)
```

## save fitted data
```{r}
fitted_save_data <- fitted %>% 
  unnest(coef) %>%
  # add more IC values
  mutate(ICs=map(
    model, 
    \(x) dr4pl::IC(x, inhib.percent=c(10, 50, 90)) %>% 
      enframe() %>% 
      pivot_wider() )) %>% 
  unnest(ICs) %>% 
  select(!c(data, model, pred))

writexl::write_xlsx(
  list(fitted=fitted_save_data), 
  str_glue("{Sys.Date()}_{fitting_obj}_DoseFit_{fitting_Y}.xlsx"))
```
